result.stdout:
Cs2Ts v1.2.3 - C# to TypeScript converter

Converts C# classes, records, structs, interfaces, and enums marked with
[ConvertToTs] into TypeScript type definitions.

Usage:
  cs2ts <outputFolder>    Generate TypeScript files into the specified folder
  cs2ts --help            Show this help message
  cs2ts --version         Show the version number

Arguments:
  <outputFolder>          Path where .ts files will be written.
                          Existing .ts files in this directory will be deleted.

Flags:
  -h, --help              Show this help message
  -v, --version           Show the version number

The tool scans all .cs files in the current directory (excluding bin/obj)
and generates TypeScript for types decorated with [ConvertToTs].
